hero.seoH1: Car Rental in M'saken — Syrine Rent Car
hero.subtitle: Experience tomorrow's vehicles today. From electric dreams to luxury legends, find your perfect ride in seconds.

process.label: Simple process
process.title: Simple
process.subtitle: Four steps. Zero stress.
process.step1d: Browse our fleet of high-performance machines and pick the one that matches your vibe.
process.step2d: Fast digital ID check. No paperwork, no hassle. You're approved in minutes.
process.step3d: Pick up at our location or we deliver to your door. Engine's already warm.
process.step4d: Unlimited miles, full insurance, 24/7 roadside assist. Just drive.

features.title: Why Choose
features.subtitle: Built for speed, safety, and unforgettable experiences.
features.f1d: Book in 30 seconds. No paperwork, no waiting.
features.f3d: We bring the car to you, any time, anywhere.
features.f4d: Pick up and drop off across the globe.
features.f6d: Personal assistant for your entire journey.

vipFleet.heroSubtitle: Browse our fleet and drive away with the right vehicle. Simple, transparent, ready when you are.

about.label: About
about.title: Your car rental agency in M'saken, right in the heart of town.
about.lead: Syrine Rent a Car (SRC) is located on Bd Dr Taieb Hachicha. We offer a well-maintained fleet — sedans, compacts, and recent models — for business trips, family travel, and tourism.
about.lead2: Our team welcomes you on site with clear pricing, clean vehicles, and personal service: book by phone, WhatsApp, or visit the agency in person.
about.heroImageAlt: Syrine Rent a Car storefront in M'saken with fleet parked in front
about.agencySubtitle: A real location, a team that listens
about.agencyCaption: Find our « Location de voitures » sign in M'saken: on-site pickup, keys handover, and advice. Easy parking in front of the shop.
about.story1: Syrine Rent a Car was built to offer honest, straightforward rental in M'saken and the surrounding area: no hidden fees, no unnecessary paperwork. We know our clients — short stays, long rentals, transfers, or chauffeur service.
about.story2: Every vehicle is checked before handover. Whether you're driving in town, along the coast, or on business, we match the right car to your budget and comfort.
about.missionText: Make the road easier for you: fast booking, reliable cars, responsive support. That's what guides every rental at SRC.
about.bullet2: Clean, insured vehicles with regular maintenance
about.bullet3: In-agency welcome and WhatsApp for urgent requests
about.servicesLead: A complete offer for all your travel needs in Tunisia.
about.s1d: Daily, weekly, or monthly — for individuals and businesses.
about.s2d: Sedans, compacts, and recent models selected for comfort and reliability.
about.s3d: Professional driver for transfers, events, or business travel.
about.s4d: Airport or station pickup, or vehicle delivery on request.
about.valuesLead: Three pillars that define how we work every day.
about.v1d: Clear prices, readable contracts, vehicles that match your booking.
about.v2d: A local team that responds quickly — in person, by phone, or WhatsApp.
about.v3d: Regular fleet maintenance and on-time handovers.
about.ctaSubtitle: Book your vehicle or stop by the agency — we're open Monday to Saturday, 8am to 6pm.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's plan your drive
contact.subtitle: Reach us any way you like—or lock in a 30-minute call. We're here 24/7 for pickups, changes, and VIP requests.
